description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push. The workflow should have four jobs: one for AppleClang on MacOS 10.15 and 11 with C++17 and 2a, one for GCC 9.3 on Ubuntu 20.04 with C++17, and two matrix jobs for GCC and Clang on Ubuntu 20.04 with various C++ standards. Each job should check out the repository, verify the C++ compiler, and run make with specific flags.
